issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (checking Life cards in play) not 'TurnCount'. 'TurnCount' checks turn number; 'HasAttachedDon' checks don count (Life cards).
Condition requires 'max':2 to represent '2 or less Life cards'. Structure should be {"type":"HasAttachedDon","max":2}

Action should prevent attack, not Rest. 'Rest' immobilizes a character; the effect prevents attacks during this turn. This requires a duration-based restriction or custom action. If using Rest as workaround, it's semantically incorrect for 'cannot attack during this turn'.
Missing duration specification. Text states 'during this turn' → should have duration:"DuringYourTurn" to indicate temporary restriction.
Extraneous second effect with Trigger and PlayFromHand. No such effect exists in card text. This appears to be unrelated card data.
